author: Claude Code
content:
Fix applied: added `SLUG=$(echo "$SLUG" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')` on line 104 of init.sh, right after the slug default is set and before validation. This converts any uppercase input to lowercase automatically.

Files modified:
- `init.sh` (line 104): added auto-lowercase conversion
- `template/init.sh`: synced from root init.sh

Both interactive input and `--slug` CLI argument are covered since they converge at the same code path.
